ogTitle: Upper Daradgee vs Upper Dawson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Daradgee and Upper Dawson.
heading: Upper Daradgee vs Upper Dawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Daradgee, Queensland and Upper Dawson, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Daradgee has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Upper Dawson (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Daradgee or Upper Dawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Daradgee has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Upper Dawson scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Daradgee scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Dawson scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Daradgee or Upper Dawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Daradgee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
